name: Send Email
description: Sends an email via Gmail SMTP. Use when the user asks to email someone, forward information, or send themselves a summary. Always confirm the recipient, subject, and body with the user before sending — emails cannot be unsent.
author: Michael

to.description: Required. Recipient email address (e.g. 'manon@example.com'). For multiple recipients, comma-separate them.

body.description: Required. Email body. Can be plain text or HTML. For HTML, wrap in <html><body>...</body></html>.

is_html.description: Optional. Set to 'true' if body contains HTML. Defaults to plain text.
